programme.title: The Comeback with Craig Carton
programme.desc: Craig Carton sits down with those who have experienced the highs and lows of gambling addiction to amplify their stories, break down the stigma surrounding gambling disorder, raise awareness of support resources for individuals and their families.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant will be laying on their back on a plexi-glass platform that is hung from a helicopter. Contestants will determine how much of the animals they will have to eat. Contestant will have to cross beams placing flags along the way.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant will be locked in a plexi-glass box that will be hung from a crane, lowered into the water. A contestant bobs into a tank of fluid. One will be driving the main car and the other will be driving the ramp car along a flatbed semi truck.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants sit on a bicycle on top of one of two semi trucks. Contestants have to pick up hornworms and squeeze the juice out into a glass. Contestant must walk on beam from one building to another.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will be riding on the back of a jet ski. Contestant is placed in a Plexiglas helmet, which is then filled with moray eels. Contestants must ride a platform that is continuously moving and retrieve a flag and return to the moving platform.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will be bound face to face by their wrists to a poll attached to a plexi-glass platform. Contestants are placed into a Plexiglas helmet filled with spiders. Couples will be standing and bound by their ankles to a platform attached to a lever.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant will be strapped by their waist, ankles, and wrist and locked to the face of a wheel, halfway into the water. Contestants will shoot at wall of bottles with a paintball gun. Contestant must stand on a swaying platform hanging from a helicopter.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will walk across a truss suspended above the ground wearing a chain mail suit. Contestants will shoot a flaming arrow from a cross bow at a scarecrow target. Contestant is secured into an upright coffin, filled with bugs.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will climb out of the moving tram and grab a net attached to the tram. Contestants will drink a shake consisting of rats. A plexi-glass wall with a lip hangs under the helicopter and they must traverse the wall releasing flags along the way.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will be standing on opposite platforms suspended in the air. Contestants will be locked in a cage and hung from a crane. Contestant will have to siphon fluid out of containers and into a funnel. A contestant will cross a beam above ground.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Poles will be attached and hung off the dump truck off the ground. Plexiglas box is buried in the sand and filled with water and sand. Contestants will be standing on a car that is suspended over the water by a crane.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will be standing on top of a platform that covers a water tank. A blindfolded contestant is guided by their partner's verbal commands to a tank filled with leeches. Contestants will be standing a tube that is suspended in the air from a crane.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant will be standing on the platform that is suspended. Contestants will lick bugs off of ropes. A glass tube is suspended vertically from a crane with the top sealed and the bottom open and submerges in a pool.

programme.title: Fear Factor

programme.desc: Authorities track a kidnapper who let his victim write a last will and informed the family of her murder. A phone number written on a previous page left a lasting impression, which helped to convict.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy gets caught up in a tormenting cycle of buying a useless appliance from a fast-talking salesman, then trading it in for something more expensive when trying to return it.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Could it be? Is Lucy Ricardo not funny? When Lucy's jokes fail to crack a smile amongst her friends and husband, she begins to develop an inferiority complex. Her depression gets worse when she discovers she's no good at bridge.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ethel flashes back to the time when she and Lucy raced to win the presidency of their club, the Wednesday Afternoon Fine Arts League. When Ethel was nominated for the position, Lucy bribed another member to nominate her.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Fred and Ethel overhear a fight between Ricky and Lucy...or did they? It seems Lucy is reading a murder mystery out loud to the amusement of Ricky. But when Ricky playfully throws the book at Lucy, she ends up with a black eye.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos and Mertzes are out a restaurant and Lucy keeps changing her order and their seating. Ricky points out that she constantly changes her mind and never completes things.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos' infant is cranky and keeps his parents as well as their neighbors up at night. When a neighbor, Mrs. Trumbull points out that the lease forbids children and threatens to move out along with other tenants.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ricky are exhausted from walking the baby at night and hire a maid. Lucy prepares a list of dos and don'ts in order to set down the law for her new employee. However when Mrs. Porter arrives, she has her own list for her employer.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy wants to get into the act when Ricky is producing an Indian show at the Tropicana. Ricky instead hires the Mertzes to be part of the show, hoping Lucy will be cured of her show biz bug now that she is a mother.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky has planned a surprise party for Lucy's birthday and swears the Mertzes and all their friends to secrecy. Lucy, however, only knows that everyone has forgotten her birthday.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: An eligible bachelor is in town, and Lucy wants to set him up with a girlfriend of hers. The bachelor is a lingerie salesman by the name of Eddie Grant who is a friend of the Mertzes. Unfortunately, Lucy's attempts at matchmaking fail.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Without consulting Ricky, Lucy buys new living room furniture, using their old set as a down payment. Waiting for the right moment to tell Ricky the news, she hides the new furniture in the kitchen.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy feels that she and Ricky are growing apart because they don't share many of the same interests. To make up for this, Lucy decides to invite herself along to a camping trip that Ricky and Fred are going on.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Life magazine does a photo layout on the Ricardos and the only part of Lucy visible in the shot is her elbow. Lucy insists on getting a part in Ricky's act so that she can make a name for herself.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Dismayed that they can't seem to unglue their husbands from the boxing match on TV, Lucy and Ethel decided to go out for a bite to eat. However, at the local café they run into a similar problem.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos have just purchased a new washing machine and despite their better judgment, agree to sell their old one to the Mertzes. The next day the old machine explodes with water and suds and the Mertzes insist that the deal is off.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy decides that the Ricardos need a bigger apartment. She discovers that an older couple in the building just had their daughter move out and they no longer need the extra space. All she needs to do is to convince Ricky to go along with the trade.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: After watching two women walk out of a local dress shop with $200 in purchases, Lucy and Ethel decide to buy the shop and go into business for themselves. The first signs of trouble begin when they can't agree on a name for their store.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The annual talent show for the Wednesday Afternoon Fine Arts League is going to be televised this year, and Lucy and Ethel are going to perform a duet. Everything is going well as Lucy gets Ricky to emcee the show and help her and Ethel prepare.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: treated as if they were men. Later on, when the two couples go out to dinner, Fred and Ricky follow the ladies' instructions.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky's friend Charlie Appleby and his wife Caroline are coming over for dinner at the Ricardos. Charlie is going to have Ricky emcee a TV program he's working on and so Ricky wants to make a good impression at dinner.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky, Fred, and Ethel don't believe that Lucy could go one day without telling a lie. To prove their point, they bet her $100 that within 24 hours she'll be fibbing up a storm.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos and Mertzes have a close encounter of the French kind when they go to a bistro and have no clue how to read the menu. Later on, Lucy and Ethel decide to brush up on their French in order to get into the show.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ethel complains about how shabby her apartment is. She's ashamed of holding a meeting for the Wednesday Afternoon Fine Arts League at her place where women will be donning minks.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: It all started with the good intention of getting Fred a new suit for his birthday. Lucy needed to "borrow" an old suit of Fred's for the correct measurements, but there was a witness to her burglary.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel are sick of their husbands dressing like slobs when they go out together in the evenings. After one particular outing, the girls get fed up and give their old clothes to a second-hand store.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy gets another shot at being a star when a talent scout for the movies comes to town. Casting for the production agrees to audition Lucy after she gives him an impromptu performance of "There's No Business Like Show Business" with the Mertzes.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: A magazine test has gotten Lucy into a tizzy. Lucy and Ricky take a test called "How to Rate Your Marriage." One of the questions in the quiz asks about old flames. When Lucy rattles off a list of old boyfriends, Ricky feels the need to compare.

programme.title: NCIS

programme.desc: A principios de los años ochenta, un par de ladrones en serie de bancos ganaron reputación entre las fuerzas de la ley como bandidos formidables.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En el verano de 1999, Texas fue aterrorizada por un asesino en serie que viajaba en tren. El FBI organizó una fuerza de tareas para reunir información sobre el viajero peligroso y crear un perfil que ayudara a localizarlo.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En octubre de 1995, una familia de Carolina del Sur fue tomada de rehén como parte de un robo de banco bien planificado. La policía local rápidamente identificó a dos de los criminales, pero el autor demostró ser más evasivo.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En febrero de 1988, un vendedor de una disquera en Sandusky, Ohio, recibió un disparo mortal en su camioneta. Después de descubrir un bolso con miles de dólares dentro del vehículo, la policía supo que el robo no era el motivo.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En junio de 1973, una niña fue secuestrada de un parque estatal en el río Misuri mientras acampaba con su familia. Pasaron varios meses sin tener pistas, pero luego un agente del FBI tomó un interés particular en el caso.

programme.desc: The Ninja now have all the items they need to get to the tomb of the First Spinjitzu Master but before they can figure out the last riddle that leads to the location of the tomb.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninja use Ronan’s airship to travel to the tomb of the First Spinjitzu Master in an underwater cave under the ocean, only to find out Moro is already there.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When Moro uses the Realm Crystal to open a portal to the Cursed Realm, ghosts take over the town - but the Ninja, in disguise, manage to get Lloyd to the center of the town and Lloyd steals the crystal…

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: As the ghosts converge around and mobilize the Preeminent into a hulking giant behemoth, the Ninja use Airjitzu to fight the mobile beast in an attempt to slow it down.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: After the defeat of the ghosts and the destruction of the Cursed Realm, the ninja finds themselves famous all over Ninjago.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The secret, he says, is the venom of a Tiger Widow, a rare creature that lives on only one island. The venom can slow a djinn down. Soto is the only one who knows where the island is and will only tell if the ninja breaks him out of jail.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Nadakhan vows revenge on the ninja and NINJAGO. The ninja and Soto escape from jail, only to find out the map to the island is on Nadakhan’s ship. Nadakhan discovers that Nya looks just like Delara, his long-lost love.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The ninja’s search for Nadakhan’s ship turns up nothing. Nadakhan’s crew is struggling to handle an airship that used to sail only on the oceans. Nadakhan confronts Jay and talks him into making a wish that will win him Nya.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Jay reveals to Cole that he made two wishes with Nadakhan. Large chunks of NINJAGO City are disappearing without a trace. The ninja find the Tiger Widow Island on the map but it is an island that exists on no other chart or database.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Jay is trapped on Nadakhan’s ship, as Nadakhan tries to force him to make his third wish. Lloyd, Cole, and Nya are marooned on Tiger Widow Island.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The ninja are trying to figure out a way to save Jay from Nadakhan’s ship. Two screenwriters, Kevin and Dan, suggest that they build a fake raid zeppelin and disguise themselves as Sky Pirates.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Jay and Nya have been holed up at the police precinct, but the Sky Pirates track him down. They flee by boat to the lighthouse where Zane’s father was once held captive. Nadakhan learns that the ninja still have the Tiger Widow venom.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Master Wu mistakenly tries to single-handedly complete a battle he began decades ago against Acronix, one of the twin Hands of Time.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninja learn more about the Krux and Acronix – the two fallen Elemental Masters known as the Hands of Time – and are sure that this threat has finally been eliminated.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Kai's investigation of a Vermillion Warrior Helmet leads him to discover that Krux is alive and well in Ninjago, living under an assumed identity.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: In the midst of an epidemic of mysterious metal thefts by the Vermillion Warriors, Lloyd realizes that stepping up and taking over for the ailing Master Wu is not an easy task.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: While the Ninja fight to save MegaMonster Amusement Park, Jay struggles to defend his family's home from the Vermillion Warriors.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninja celebrate their escape from the Vermillion Army and their retrieval of the Emerald Time Blade, but with Acronix and Krux determined to get their Blade back, the Airjitzu Temple becomes a battleground.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When the Ninja interrupt Lord Garmadon from using his Mega-Weapon to ‘turn back the clock’ and bring to life the fossils of a monster, the Ninja are accidentally hit and turned into kids.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When Garmadon travels back in time in order to undo the past and rid the Ninja from the future, the Ninja follow him and try to stop him by using the Golden Weapons from the past to clash against Garmadon’s Mega-Weapon.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Lloyd moves in and tries to make nice by helping out with chores, but he just gets in the way. Pythor has awoken the Vipoids and the Constrictaurs and an all out snake war has taken over Ninjago.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Pythor declares himself to be the destined leader who will reawaken The Great Devourer – an ancient beast who can’t be killed and will consume all of Ninjago. We find out Nya is the Samurai and Lloyd is taken prisoner by the snake tribes.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When the four ninja follow the mysterious falcon into the woods, they stumble on a hidden work shop where Zane learns the secret about his past and in the process, finally knowing who he is, he is the first ninja to unlock his true potential.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Jay and Nya have to cut their first date in Mega-Monster Amusement Park short as the Serpentine are on their way to retrieve the first or four fang blades to be used to awaken the Great Devourer.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The four ninja go undercover as a dance troupe and enter a talent contest in their quest to win “The Blade Cup” where one of the fang blades is hidden.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The ninjas are suspicious when their arch enemy Lord Garmadon moves in to help searching for his missing son Lloyd

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The ninja and Sensei Wu try to infiltrate the Serpentines’ inner sanctum and walk right into a trap, and when Lloyd’s rescue mission fails, there is only one person who can help them, namely the evil Lord Garmadon – but can they trust him?

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The ninja haste to the lost city of Ouroboros to try to stop Pythor from awaking The Great Devourer but it is a race against time.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Just as the rebuilding effort in Ninjago begins, the four ninjas come to realize that evil has started to resurface with Lord Garmadon forging the ninjas’ lost Golden Weapons into a Mega-Weapon with unspeakable powers.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Ortega se va unos días a vivir con Jonathan y esto crea un conflicto con Olaf, mientras Irmita espera la visita de su prima a quien le esconde un gran secreto.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Frustrado por su trabajo, Gaspar busca apoyo en el Abuelo y el Noruego y termina accidentado. Mientras, gracias a la medicina experimental, Peluzín se convierte en el Dr Lambretón.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego cansado de que todo mundo lo busque solo por su dinero busca a Pitipú para que le ayude a idear un plan, mientras que Peluzín se embarca en el mundo de la robótica.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego no cumple con sus responsabilidades con la casa por lo que es expulsado por Gaspar. El Noruego se embarca en una travesía sin saber que lleva un ángel guardián. Segunda parte.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar cansado de la ineficiencia y corrupción decide postularse como servidor público, mientras que Irma es grabada en una situación incómoda, convirtiéndose en una celebridad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pelúzín se roba un paquete de la puerta de Don Sebas, volteando a todo el edificio de cabeza, mientras Jonathan, cansado del bullying del Abuelo decide darle una lección.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego decide recuperar a su antigua mascota tlacuache llamada Chofri, mientras que el Abuelo atraviesa por un lapso de demencia senil y depende de Gaspar salvarlo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo encuentra la manera de aprovecharse del sistema de seguros a costa de Peluzín. Mientras Gaspar les encarga al Noruego y a Jonathan que recojan en el aeropuerto a un familiar que viene de visita de los Estados Unidos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego sigue con su plan de casarse con la Ivanka de cera, mientras que el Abuelo y Peluzín afianzan su relación después de su gran viaje

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Camino a rentar una película, el Noruego adquiere una nueva mascota. En tanto, Peluzín tiene que mudarse de su departamento por falta de pago.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego todavía no puede asimilar que perdió toda su fortuna, mientras que el Abuelo malaconseja a Peluzín de cómo pagar la renta atrasada de su departamento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar y el Abuelo se topan con una familia muy peculiar, situación que el Abuelo busca aprovechar, mientras que Peluzín y Pitipu buscan curar a Don Sebas de una extraña adicción.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Accidentalmente, el Abuelo descubre las habilidades boxísticas de Peluzín y se dedica a explotarlas. Mientras, el Noruego se embarca en la búsqueda de un nuevo hobbie.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: En una borrachera, el Abuelo y el Noruego atropellan con su coche a Santa Claus justo antes de la Navidad. Para no dejar a los niños sin regalos, el Abuelo toma el lugar del accidentado.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El noruego busca crear un vínculo de nuevo con su hijo Olaf por medio de un regalo, mientras que el Abuelo, Johnatan, Peluzín y todo el edificio están vueltos locos con los álbumes de estampitas del mundial 2018.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo y el Noruego buscan nuevos horizontes a través de la creación de una fundación, mientras Peluzín cae en la cuenta de su soledad y sale a buscar amigos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se topa con un niño de la calle con quien supuestamente mantiene un parentesco mientras que Peluzín organiza un negocio piramidal para aprovecharse de todos los del edificio

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego milagrosamente logra que le den un crédito bancario, mientras que Peluzín se aprovecha de una muerte reciente dentro del edificio para su beneficio económico.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: En este episodio La familia del barrio muestra una divertida parodia a las Sitcoms mas populares, desde la óptica del prototipo de familia mexicana disfuncional.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Jonathan y Gaspar buscan darle una lección al Abuelo en en Día del Padre, mientras que el Noruego se siente que no es valorado por Olaf y junto con Peluzín deciden tomar cartas en el asunto.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Mientras que el Abuelo está vuelto loco por encontrar su revista favorita, Peluzín desentierra la verdad sobre su verdadera familia.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo sufre un accidente y es llevado de emergencia al hospital pero no es posible la operación. Deciden esperar a que se cure solo, llevándose una sorpresa. Mientras tanto, Olaf decide pedirle ayuda escolar a Jonathan y termina por aprovecharse.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo sufre un accidente y mientras esta al filo de la muerte revalora su vida desde sus inicios recordando una parte de su infancia, la que busca esclarecer una vez recuperada su salud.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un extraño bebé aparece en la puerta de LFDB, quien viene acarreando una ola de destrucción. Ahora la salvación del mundo depende de la Familia del Barrio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín adquiere una nueva mascota que revolucionará el vecindario. En tanto el Noruego y Gaspar intentan ayudar a el Lentejas a superar sus extrañas inclinaciones sexuales.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se de cuenta que el y el Noruego pueden ser padre e hijo. Pitipú es atropellado.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar cansado de la ineficiencia y corrupción decide postularse como servidor público, mientras que Irma es grabada en una situación incómoda, convirtiéndose en una celebridad.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: ¡Explora la seguridad con Little Angel! Desde el patio de recreo hasta la los primeros auxilios, pasando por la hora de la siesta y el cuidado de la piel. Será un viaje lleno de diversión para mantenerte a salvo.

programme.desc: An illicit auction selling smuggled treasures is taking place. Lupin targets the auction. In the process, Lupin discovers the auctioneer is Cornelia, the woman he once loved who died saving his life…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin is reunited with Cornelia, a woman who died by her father's hands to save Lupin's life. However, Cornelia's memories of Lupin have been erased. Her father is Dr. Zel, a Nazi who has succeeded in resurrecting corpses and controlling them.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The aging Inspector Hanshichi Mikawa, who failed to capture Lupin 10 years ago, is viewed as a nuisance by his peers at the downtown police station. Lupin has announced he'll be stealing the golden Kannon statuette.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang have stolen the "36 Views of Mt. Fuji," a famous series of 46 woodblock prints, from the exhibition hall. However, a gang calling itself the Shiranami Five challenges Lupin head-on by stealing one of the prints from him.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Goemon, siding with the Shiranami Five, challenges Lupin to a one-on-one duel. While Goemon keeps Lupin busy, the Shiranami Five steals the 36 Views, but one of its members, Kikuko Benten, betrays her gang and escapes with the loot.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: On a wild whim, Inspector Zenigata swipes a throwing coin owned by his great Edo-era ancestor, Heiji Zenigata while he's viewing the inside of an incredible new safe protected by Professor Hunter's super computer.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and Jigen are after the Aurora Droplet, a diamond adorning a prima ballerina's tiara. During the heist, Jigen is wounded and in a twist of fate, is saved by Monica, the prima ballerina.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: After shaking off Inspector Zenigata's pursuit, Lupin is stopped by a monstrously huge Fujiko on his way home! The giant Fujiko turns out to be an illusion created by Madame X. Lupin learns Madame X's hobby is collecting famous people.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Bandit leader Basara is determined to sniff out the location of the diamonds Lupin has hidden somewhere in India. Armed with his sinister invention, the Suicide Ray Gun, he tries to make Lupin talk, even trying his luck with a fake Fujiko.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Trouble is all but guaranteed when a crime boss and an arms merchant join hands. The two set their eyes on Goemen's sword, which can split a tank in half! After hiring Fujiko to steal it, they transform the sword into an invincible flying weapon of war.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Jigen and Gomen have sent a letter saying they are being held captive in a small but terrifying village. Lupin arrives in the village to rescue them, but Jigen and Goemon are acting oddly.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Don Kecchi, the wealthiest man in America, is terminally ill and has announced that he's donating his entire fortune to charity. However, Lupin steals Kecchi's money and shoots Fujiko right in front of Inspector Zenigata!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Margaret Tiffany, the owner of Tiffany's and a TV anchor, hires Lupin and his gang to rob her jewelry store on live TV. Initially, Lupin refuses, but ends up having to go through with it thanks to Fujiko's wild spending habits.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A princess of a small Silk Road country has been kidnapped. Lupin and his gang are persuaded to rescue Princess Yasmin in exchange for a stomach full of holy curry meant for the gods. However, the kidnapping was a trap to lure Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Here comes Beauty, the assassin hired by ICPO Headquarters to knock off Lupin! Overwhelmed by Beauty's powerful DumDum bullets, Lupin narrowly escapes with his life thanks to Jigen's quick thinking.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang head to the isolated country of Kimasan, after hearing the country possesses mountains of treasure. They sneak across the border but are quickly captured by Kinkaku and Ginkaku, the giants who rule the country.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Casino Paradise is an artificial island owned and operated by Domino, a casino tycoon. Domino decides to run for President and brags that with $500 million to spend, the only way he can lose is if Lupin steals his campaign funds!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Political fixer Pomade Jaws trusts no one, not even his wife Laura. He's stored the scandalous secrets of various world leaders inside a voice-activated safe.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin, Jigen and Goemon have turned themselves in to the FBI, but it's all part of the plan. Their real goal is to break out old man Clyde Barlow, who was once known as a genius bank robber, to get his help with their heist of the National Super Bank.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Isamu Kondo III, grandson of the leader of the Shinsengumi, hires Lupin and his gang to recover a golden cannon sunk by the Shogunate forces in the Tsugaru Strait. After much effort, the valuable golden cannon is finally recovered from the deep ocean.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Ellery Queen, the owner of the legendary sapphire called "The Eye of Solomon," is also the owner of a football team. Lupin, coming for the sapphire as announced, discovers Queen on the brink of death.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The 3rd Thieves Olympic is about to be held in Japan, and Lupin and Jigen are in it to win it! After winning the first and second Thieves Olympic, if they also win this year's getaway race, they'll become the first-ever Triple-Crown winners!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The world's largest diamond has been discovered in South Africa and Lupin has his eyes on the prize. But as it turns out, stealing it is the easy part!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Fujiko decides to marry Huffner for his jewelry collection, disregarding the rumor that Huffner's brides always die a mysterious death within a few weeks of their wedding. Turns out, he's also a collector of brides and likes them permanently preserved!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Jigen receives a letter from Sister Angelica and heads to the African country of Borodias. Sister Angelica wants Jigen's help to rescue Dr. Othello, the leader of the country's independence movement.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP

programme.title: La venganza de los ex: Caribe

programme.desc: Sanji hears a woman's scream for help and dashes into the room the scream can be heard from. However, it's a trap set up by Black Maria of the Tobi Roppo. Meanwhile, Luffy and Jimbei who are trying to reach the rooftop get help from the unexpected.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While Kaido begins the New Onigashima Project, Marco appears in front of Chopper and the others, who are struggling with Ice Oni. The members of the Tobi Roppo continue to give the Straw Hats a hard time while their former member helps Zoro.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Yamato tells Momonosuke and Shinobu that he once confronted a man, who came to Onigashima looking to get Kaido's head. His name was Ace. The two of them engaged in a fierce battle that eventually turned into an important friendship.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The formidable Lead Performers of the Animal Kingdom Pirates stand in Zoro's way as he tries to get to the rooftop. Marco sees his late comrade in Zoro's determination and tries to pave the way for him.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Yamato tells Momonosuke and Shinobu about how Ace gave him hope for the future. Meanwhile, Luffy and the other allied pirates from the Worst Generation make it to the rooftop to finally face off against Kaido and Big Mom.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy's strong attack reminds Kaido of all the strong ones he's ever met. On the other hand, Luffy, Law, and Kid keep quarreling amongst themselves. Meanwhile, Sanji is caught and interrogated by Black Maria in what he calls "heaven."

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy, Law, Kid, Zoro, and Killer keep landing hard blows against Kaido in tandem despite the arguing. However, when Big Mom steps in and unleashes powerful lightning strikes, the tide turns for all except one of the rookies.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy pummels Kaido with his well-trained Kong Gatling and delivers a final blow using all his strength. Big Mom tries to fight back, but Law gets in her way and Kid and Killer also try to finish Kaido off.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: After watching the Straw Hats' departure to Onigashima, Tama wondered if there was anything she could do to help the Straw Hats and the samurai. Now that she's here on Onigashima, it's time to execute her powerful plan – Operation Kibi Dango!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji is captured and tortured by the merciless Black Maria. She names the terms of his release: to turn over one of his crewmates. He hesitates but has no other option. After much distress, he makes a move that surprises everyone.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Robin bursts in to rescue Sanji along with Brook, and faces Black Maria, who is trying to keep Sanji as her pet. Meanwhile, Yamato, Momonosuke, and Shinobu are spotted hiding by the enemy, and they find themselves on the run again.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Chopper works hard to make the cure for Ice Oni, even though he is turning into one himself. Meanwhile, the infected Boss Hyogoro the Flower regains his youth and fights fiercely to protect Chopper and the others.

programme.title: One Piece

programme.desc: After a shooting at a nightclub, it appears that the FBI may have ignored previous threats from a local white supremacist group.

programme.desc: A loving husband and father of two, Jim Russo, is kidnapped after accidentally getting involved in illegal dealings far beyond what he imagined.

programme.desc: When a super computer is the prime suspect in the death of cutting-edge scientist, the team must use new means to crack the case. Meanwhile, Charlie weighs a compelling job offer.

programme.title: Sailor Moon

programme.title: Sailor Moon

programme.title: Sailor Moon

programme.title: Sailor Moon

programme.title: Sailor Moon

programme.title: Sailor Moon

programme.title: Sailor Moon

programme.title: Sailor Moon

programme.title: Sailor Moon

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un hombre con picazón por la exposición al roble venenoso resulta que también tiene gusanos excavando en una herida en su espalda; una mujer joven tiene un labio sangrante.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Una adolescente es atravesada por el cuello en una cerca de hierro; un paciente está convencido de que se está convirtiendo en un vampiro.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un paciente psiquiátrico tiene un amor extremo por el budín de chocolate; un paciente en shock anafiláctico puede ser alérgico a su novia, y un hombre con una cara extrañamente hinchada debe ser convencido para recibir tratamiento.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: El embarazo de una mujer es un shock para su esposo y se dirige hacia la tragedia cuando la eclampsia amenaza su vida y la vida de su hijo; un hombre abruma sus riñones por el consumo excesivo de cerveza.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: La sala de emergencias se convierte en un lugar peligroso cuando se encuentran drogas de contrabando en el vientre de un paciente; un médico está desconcertado por múltiples ataques cardíacos en una familia.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un hombre llega a urgencias con la piel azulada; una adolescente tiene dolores abdominales que los médicos no han podido diagnosticar durante años; y un médico lucha por salvar la vida del único superviviente de un accidente aéreo.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Los paramédicos se apresuran a la escena de un traumático accidente de carretera. El Dr. Eric Maniago ha tratado a muchos VIP, pero cuando una princesa se presenta en su sala de emergencias, se encuentra en un territorio desconocido.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Números
programme.desc: Don con el equipo investigan una serie de pequeños robos bancarios y se centran en el desacreditado agente del FBI Roger Bloom como sospechoso, cuando se enteran de que ha estado estudiando los archivos de algunos de los grandes robos bancarios.

programme.title: Números
programme.desc: Don y el equipo empiezan una búsqueda frenética, cuando Amita es secuestrada, los lleva hacia un carismático sociópata. Le corresponde a Charlie descubrir cuáles son los extraños planes del sospechoso para ella, al final de la quinta temporada.

programme.title: Números
programme.desc: El equipo de Don debe escoltar durante unos días a Benjamin Polk, un conflictivo activista político que pertenece a una importante familia estadounidense. Durante uno de sus mítines, el equipo de Don resulta tiroteado por un francotirador anónimo.

programme.title: Números
programme.desc: Dos agentes del FBI son asesinados durante un tiroteo en un banco. Don y su equipo deben reconstruir exactamente lo que sucedió. Además, Charlie y Amita se preocupan cuando Larry decide no asistir a una conferencia en Ginebra.

programme.title: Números
programme.desc: Don y su equipo investigan una red de juego ilegal que ha puesto en marcha un torneo de ruleta rusa. Pronto encuentran una página en Internet por donde se está emitiendo la mortal competición.

programme.title: Números
programme.desc: Don y el equipo investigan una serie de asesinatos que se dan cuenta de que están siendo copiados de escenas de una película que se estrenará próximamente. Además, Larry se marcha para embarcarse en su aventura personal.

programme.title: Números
programme.desc: El equipo es apartado misteriosamente de la investigación del secuestro de una niña de tres años por parte de uno de sus progenitores. Don y Charlie deciden entonces ponerse ellos mismos manos a la obra al margen del sistema para encontrar a la pequeña.

programme.title: Números
programme.desc: Cuando se observan sucesos extraños, casi paranormales, en una base aérea fuera de servicio, los espeluznantes sucesos adquieren un tono diferente cuando el equipo es contratado para investigar el misterio de una mujer muerta encontrada allí.

programme.title: Números
programme.desc: El equipo lleva a cabo una operación encubierta para localizar a un señor del crimen cibernético, pero la operación es frustrada por un hacker brillante cuyo deseo de apoderarse de los mercados negros en línea lo mete en una peligrosa guerra territorial.

programme.title: Doc Martin

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: La clínica de Martin abre oficialmente como negocio, pero los pacientes continúan usándola como un café para reunirse.

programme.title: Heartland

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Lou envía por error al caballo de la Sra. Roach, Swallow, a casa antes de que se cure de su miedo al tráfico. Una inconsciente Ashley sale disparada violentamente cuando el caballo se asusta con un camión.

programme.title: Heartland

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.desc: When Jimmy tells Heloise about the magic of snow, she sees an opportunity to infuriate Lucius. --- Jimmy defends the adorable but evil Weavils when their habitat is threatened by Lucius’ construction plans.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: Lost in Clownburg, Jimmy finds himself hassled by a pack of ill-tempered rodeo clowns. --- When an emergency at Misery Inc. keeps Lucius from his date with Jez, he bribes Jimmy and Beezy to keep her occupied.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: When Heloise posts an embarrassing video of Lucius on 'Spew Tube', it's up to Jimmy to restore the evil leader's bad reputation. --- Heloise breaks out the body swapper to get some sweet revenge after Beezy and Cerbee crash her picnic with Jimmy.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: When Lucius jacks up the heat into record-breaking levels, Jimmy infuriates him by throwing a beach party. --- When Lucius bans the use of cell phones in Miseryville, Jimmy turns to Dr. Scientist to help cure Beezy‘s mobile-mania.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: Heloise’s supposedly miserable new invention turns out to be a carnival. --- In order to score tickets to see ‘Runny and the Nosebleeds’, Beezy and Jimmy get jobs babysitting the Molotov’s bratty kids.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: When Jimmy starts beating Lucius at Golf, Samy and Heloise must intervene before Lucius floods the whole town. --- Jimmy plays matchmaker to find Beezy a date to Lucius' statue-unveiling ceremony.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: An overconfident Jimmy steps into the ring to replace injured professional wrestler ‘Goat Boy’. --- When Jimmy uses Lucius’ private privy, an outraged Lucy destroys every washroom in Miseryville.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: Jimmy’s new catchphrase launches him into superstardom, and Lucius wants in. --- When Lucius fires Heloise, Jimmy makes her a list of all the fun things she can do with her free time.

programme.desc: When Lucius and Beezy start fighting more than ever, Jimmy unfreezes Heniouses One through Six for a rift-healing reunion. --- When Jimmy and Beezy take over the kitchen at ‘Chez Garbage,’ guess who ends up doing all the work.

programme.title: Kid vs. Kat

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Martín le aconseja a Norma que se case con Juan, quien sueña vivir con ella y el niño como una familia. Rosario se le atraviesa con el carro a Franco y él la rechaza, Gabriela pacta con Dínora.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Rosario se propone reconquistar a Franco, lo que ella no sabe es que Armando piensa en acabar con él en la fiesta. A las hijas y al padre de Gabriela les extraña su nueva amistad con Dínora.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: En la fiesta, Franco cubre a Sara con piropos y la acompaña al carro, ella ve cuando lo secuestran. Jimena coquetea con un invitado para darle celos a Óscar mientras Norma confronta a su madre.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Sara arriesga su vida para salvar a Franco de los matones, él le agradece con un beso. Jimena llega a la casa tras burlarse de Óscar y se preocupa por su hermana, a ambas les espera un regaño.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Norma acude a su cita con Juan, pero se va al ver que no está solo, Óscar enfrenta a Jimena delante de Gabriela, quien se indigna al saber lo sucedido. Franco busca desquitarse de los matones.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Dínora le inventa a Norma que es novia de Juan, él no se queda tranquilo, busca a la madre de su hijo y trata de aclarar todo cuando otra mentira los separa. Franco pone a Armando en su sitio.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Norma cae otra vez en la farsa de Dínora quien se ingenia una insólita historia con Gabriela de cómplice, Martín sospecha de su hija. Jimena regresa con tropiezos a la filmación del comercial.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: La noche tiene mucha seducción entre Verónica y Alejandro. David se presenta ante Verónica y le dice que le recuerda a su madre, a quién desprecia. Ella disimula cuánto le afecta el comentario. Antonia quiere matar poco a poco a la abuela de Valentina.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Verónica logra despistar a David, pero cuando él se va, ella se viene abajo. La nueva Patrona atrae el interés de todos y Antonia está furiosa al ver que sus aliados la ignoran, incluyendo su amante. Verónica consigue que Alberto se ponga de su lado.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Antonia se presenta en la casa de Verónica para declararle la guerra y la trata como si fuera Gabriela. Dantés la reta a desenterrar los restos de la minera muerta. La patrona Guerra acepta, pero Alejandro se opone rotundamente a la exhumación.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Antonia y Verónica hacen las paces tras confirmarse que el cadáver en la tumba corresponde a Gabriela Suárez. Ricardo le confiesa su problema de impotencia a Alejandro, al tiempo que le reclama el daño que le ha hecho a Patricia. Macario queda libre.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Juan se enfrenta a Armando al saber que fue él quien golpeó a Franco, Fernando le explica a la familia Elizondo por qué existe un pleito entre ellos, a Jimena le cuenta lo que pasa con Rosario.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Jimena está deprimida, Leandro la convence de que cambie su actitud, pero Franco busca a Rosario en el bar. Armando tiene en la mira el negocio que quiere comprar y cómo deshacerse de su rival.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: La policía investiga el altercado entre los Reyes y Armando, quien no se mueve del bar para no despertar sospechas; la policía lo interroga. La desaparición de Jimena y Óscar alarma a todos.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Wednesday's and Pugsley's faith in Santa Claus is shaken, Uncle Fester is chosen to back up Santa in case the real St. Nick is too busy to come. However, Fester-Santa gets stuck in the chimney, so each of the other adults fills in for him.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Fester is so smitten upon receipt of a photo of his love, a bearded carnival lady, that he borrows stamp money to mail her a proposal. Morticia dons a beard and poses as the mother to convince Fester that he will have to work to support a wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Because she thinks Fester (Jackie Coogan) and Grandmama (Blossom Rock) are spoiling the children, Morticia (Carolyn Jones) hires a governess. Insulted, Fester paints a white line down the center of the Addams house, dividing it in half.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez see Fester conferring with TV muscleman Jack LaGrann (Jack LaLanne), and think that Fester is planning a television career. However, Uncle Fester confides to Lurch that he has to go on a secret diet and exercise.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez find Grandfather Pegleg's treasure map and summon Captain Grimby. They hope to charter his boat for the treasure hunt. But after meeting the Captain, Morticia is careful to keep the nature of the mission secret.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia Frump is madly in love with Horatio Bartholomew, the man who has everything, except the truth about her relatives. Morticia, not convinced by Bartholomew, persuades playboy Cousin Itt to stir the embers of his past romance with Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley shocks his parents when he gives up his new atomic reactor as kid stuff and announces that he wants to find his own job. His first try is as a medical assistant to Dr. Bird. He turns up, scalpel in hand, ready to help during an operation.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandma Frump (guest star Margaret Hamilton), comes to the mistaken conclusion that her daughter, Morticia (Carolyn Jones), and Gomez (John Astin) plan to pack her off to an old folks home. Actually, they plan to send her to a beauty farm.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia, in order to be part of the National Beautification Program, decides to become a home decorator and offers her services to the neighbors. Next door neighbor, and insurance agent, Joe Digby hires Morticia in hopes of selling them insurance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia taunts Uncle Fester into announcing that he is going to join the Peace Corps. Fester feels he's a cinch to be accepted because Gomez plans to pull strings in Washington on his behalf. The entire family agrees to help him study for the exam.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Allyn Joslyn guest-stars as Sam Hilliard, a former truant officer who now heads a private school where Wednesday and Pugsley are enrolled. When Hilliard breaks under the strain of dealing with the Addams children, Gomez buys the school.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Dr. Marvin P. Gunderson is summoned to examine Kitty Kat, the ailing lion pet of the Addams Family. Morticia decides that it is the doctor who needs help. To build his confidence, human members of the family pretend to be ill so he can effect cures.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's concern that Lurch is overworked leads Gomez to the operating table to assemble a custom-built secondary butler. Lurch lets the robot do all the work and then begins to feel that he isn't needed anymore.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Uncle Fester incinerates the family's stuffed bear with his flamethrower, Morticia reports the accident to the insurance company. Mr. Henson the head of the company, sends his assistant, Mr. Digby, to handle the case.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch suffers from unrequited love over Tiny Trivia (guest star Diane Jergens), Morticia's visiting school chum who only has eyes for show business. The entire family decides to try to turn their stolid butler into a new personality.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Ophelia laments that she has been jilted, Morticia suggests a career as an alternative to marriage. She tries chemistry first (with explosive results) then turns to operatic singing. Cousin Itt is summoned to coach her to stardom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez decide to keep Wednesday and Pugsley home from school after Morticia sees the fairy tales they have to read. When the truant officer comes to investigate, he is shocked at what he finds.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia calls a psychiatrist after she fears Pugsley is becoming normal after he abandons his pet octopus for a puppy and is seen wearing a Boy Scout uniform, playing with a baseball bat, and helping an old lady cross the street.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester, who has become lonely, convinces Gomez and Morticia that it is time for him to find a bride. He decides to put an ad in the newspaper, looking for love. But things go awry when a door-to-door saleswoman comes by.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Election fever grips the Addams household, as Gomez (John Astin) supports the council candidate whose campaign promise is to drain the town's disgusting bogs. Morticia (Carolyn Jones), who likes "the lovely bogs," labels the candidate an extremist.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley and Wednesday start a row at a party when their gift of a tarantula upsets Harold, the birthday boy. Harold's parents insist that the Addams children lack breeding and, therefore, are no longer allowed to play with their son.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Pugsley befriends Gorgo, a circus gorilla, Gorgo decides to follow Pugsley and Gomez home, where is accepted as one of the family. But Gorgo gives Morticia's tea guests, the Ladies League members, quite a shock.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A pair of bank robbers are welcomed as Halloween trick-or-treaters by Morticia and Gomez. The creepy atmosphere of the house, Morticia's smoldering holiday punch, and Lurch's ominous presence impel the crooks to abandon their plans.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Lionel Barker, a former suitor of Morticia's, shows up, Gomez is jealous. But he's soon calmed when he learns that Barker is after Mildred, the new maid. The Addamses then discover that Barker is a con man--after Mildred's money, not her love.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Newlyweds move in next door. But the honeymoon loses its tranquility when Uncle Fester enters their house through a tunnel and they flee in terror at the sight of Lurch, Grandmama sharpening her ax, and Morticia and Gomez bathing the octopus.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family faces a crisis when Wednesday packs her spider and runs away (after being scolded for playing with Uncle Fester's TNT). When they try to file a missing person report, a detective is anxious to retire early due to their story.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Official visitors from an unfriendly nation receive the shock of their lives when they decide to exploit the Addams Family as an average uncultured family. The visitors are shaken up by Morticia's carnivorous plants among other things.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams race through Asunción, Paraguay, where they must either stack a pyramid of watermelons or perform a traditional Paraguayan bottle dance.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams in Paris, France, must whip up some tasty treats and make enough Chantilly cream for four pies, as well as compete in a series of carnival games.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams reach new heights in Berlin, as they walk face-first down the exterior of a building for nearly 200 feet.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams travel to Almaty, Kazakhstan, where they brave the cold weather while perfecting a choreographed fight scene and decorate a yurt.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams race through Hyderabad, India, where they must complete double the detours, double the road blocks and travel double the distance.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The first ever mega leg in race history continues through Hyderabad, India, where teams compete in double the detours and double the road blocks, and travel double the distance.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The final five teams race through Siem Reap, Cambodia, where they face the second and final double U-turn of the season.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: In the first city sprint, the final four teams race through Manila, the capital of the Philippines, where they have no road blocks and no detours.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: With the $1 million prize on the line, the final three teams travel to New Orleans, where one team is crowned the winner.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The Amazing Race begins its historic 33rd trip around the world when 11 new teams take off from their homes and travel to their first destination, London, England.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The Amazing Race begins its historic 33rd trip around the world when 11 new teams take off from their homes and travel to their first destination, London, England.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: While racing through Scotland in February 2020, teams receive shocking and unprecedented news - for the first time in the show's history, THE AMAZING RACE suspends production due to the COVID-19 pandemic.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Host Phil Keoghan gathers the teams in Switzerland to restart the Race nearly 20 months after production was suspended for the.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams race through Switzerland, where Racers bungee jump over 700 feet off the Verzasca Dam.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Floyd the barber has misrepresented his worldly goods to a wealthy window, who decides to visit him.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie becomes jealous when his father appears to be paying special attention to a pretty girl -- even taking her fishing with them.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Three escaped female convicts imprison Barney Fife and Floyd the barber in a remote cabin.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Aunt Bee longs for a pretty bed jacket for her birthday but seems destined to get more practical gifts from her family.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney Fife is convinced that Opie's piggy bank is safer than the Mayberry bank-and sets out to prove his point.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie must either learn how to box or lose prestige among his peers when a new boy moves into town.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney gives a parking ticket to the Governor's car, and refuses to tear it up.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A car containing a high-powered businessman breaks down in low-powered Mayberry.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney Fife is sure that a Main Street gun duel is in the offing when an ex-con comes to town.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Mayberry fears disaster when the sheriff discovers that a farmer's goat has eaten a good-sized meal of dynamite.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy and Barney look forward to seeing their high school sweethearts when the Mayberry Class of '45 holds a reunion.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A poor farmer successfully auditions to sing at a concert. Barney and Andy take it upon themselves to spruce him up for the event.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie meets a spoiled youngster and decides his own allowance should be tripled.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy uses common sense and Barney uses modern criminal detection methods to solve several burglaries at a filling station.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: The sheriff's knowledge of American history is put to the test by Opie and an attractive new history teacher.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Aunt Bee falls for the sales pitch of a fast-talking medicine man and his Indian elixir.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: The sheriff has his hands full as a clan of mountain musicians descend on Mayberry to meet a bus.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: An English tourist works off his reckless driving fine by being a valet and chauffeur for Andy.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Deputy Barney Fife invests his life's savings in a used car that turns out to be a lemon.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie suffers from puppy love so Barney attempts to show him how to handle women.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney decides that it's time to push Andy into matrimony, but Barney's marriage bureau collapses at a frantic dinner party.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A pack of hunting dogs overruns the Mayberry Courthouse just as Andy is trying to impress a visiting state official.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Howard Morris guest stars as Ernest T. Bass as the Darling clan returns to Mayberry with its own kind of mountain trouble.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney Fife becomes super-efficient in executing his duties as a deputy sheriff after two thieves are jailed in Mayberry until their accomplices are captured.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Colossal Creatures

programme.title: The Love Boat

programme.title: The Love Boat

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Angelorum Dominicus suddenly appears aboard the Pacific Princess without a reservation and soon begins to spread love and happiness to everyone on the cruise, especially a little boy in need of an operation.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A female producer is adamant about not wanting to start a relationship with an actor, but the thespian has other plans. Meanwhile, a therapist goes on a cruise with his group, while Doc and his nephew compete for the affection of the same woman.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: When Gopher suspects a skipper under Capt. Stubing's tutelage is trying to take his job, the crew jumps into action to protect their boss. Meanwhile, a lovely lady causes havoc when she boards with two men who are each after her hand.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A woman's (Joan Rivers) shyness around men is exacerbated by her recent mastectomy that is until she meets an understanding man. Meanwhile, when a married couple contemplates divorce, it's their son, who's also a lawyer, that gets caught in the middle.

programme.title: The Love Boat

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In New York, an ambitious college student has her whole life ahead of her, until she crosses the path of a killer. It's a random murder, the hardest kind to solve.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Weeks pass as forensic investigators search for even the smallest clues, only to find what they feared in their own backyard. In Canada, two people die suddenly of unknown causes, and their deaths may not be as coincidental as they first appear.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The Naval Criminal Investigative Service uses forensic science to solve three perplexing murders and fulfill their motto: “To the living we owe respect; to the dead, we owe the truth”.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some cases simply can't be solved with current technology or with the evidence at hand. But that doesn't mean they'll remain unsolved forever.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In most homicides, police rely on motive to pursue a murderer. But when the killer is a stranger…the crime may go unsolved for years. It takes a full arsenal of forensic techniques…to trace… a lethal encounter.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Formed in the 1830s to protect settlers against Indian attack, the Rangers became part of the Texas Highway Patrol in 1935. Their role has continued to evolve to keep up with changing times; today it includes sophisticated forensics labs.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A victim usually never foresees danger when the perpetrator turns out to be a friend or a lover. Science and microscopic evidence can unmask these killers and find justice for those who are Loved To Death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When a murder is committed and deceit clouds the evidence, investigators turn to science and technology to uncover the truth and expose a murderous lie and capture the killer.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The forces of nature can reduce a body to bones in a matter of weeks. Using a unique combination of art and science, forensic anthropologists give victims a face long after they have been forgotten.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: An abandoned car outside Philadelphia brings heartbreak to a family and terror to a community. A young woman is dead, the killer gone. But the marks of his passage remain.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Most victims of multiple murderers are meticulously chosen because of a mutual connection with the killer or because they match an intricate set of criteria that fits the killer's MO.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Terrorism: Thanks to new technology and, perhaps, the approaching millennium, terrorism is a growing international threat. The Oklahoma City explosion and the bombing of the World Trade Center are just two of the incidents of this growing problem.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: For the forensic entomologist, the insects that nest in dead bodies are like tiny witnesses to a crime.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A dog can be a dead man's best friend. Dogs have been trained to sniff out corpses, drugs, explosives, and missing persons. They're often the first to find the essential clue that sets an investigation in motion.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An unfounded rumor causes North Fork's outspoken feminist schoolteacher to be attacked by a mob of angry townspeople.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When his employer begins to suspect him of embezzlement, bookkeeper Asa Manning decides to hire a professional gunman to take care of the problem.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A drought has forced local cowhands to seek work on a railroad construction project, but executives are afraid workers will desert them if they believe an old man's claim of making rain.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas McCain gives blood to save a dying man and is surprised by Marshall Torrance's odd behavior towards him. Soon, men arrive from a nearby town and demand custody of the man.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark finds of the body of a murder victim, Lucas, his friend Artemus and Marshall Torrance begin a search for the killer.

programme.desc: When renegade Apaches wound Lucas and kidnap Mark, Marshall Torrance joins with U.S. Marshall Sam Buckhart to form a rescue posse.

programme.title: Muhammad Ali vs Cleveland Williams

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Classmaster and a surprise partner, announced by Samantha Smart, take on the Fierce Sisters. Chantilly Chella and Holidead face off with Las Bandidas. In the Main Event, Lana Star challenges the culprits who ran up her hotel bill.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Classmaster attempts to put Santana Garrett into detention as they battle in the ring. Also in action is Reina Del Rey, Sandy Shore, Holidead, Genesis and Katarina Jinx. The action heats up and still, so many questions surround WOW.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: WOW's new arena is the perfect setting for the unveiling of the first-ever World Trios Championship Titles. In the Main Event, Penelope Pink and Princess Aussie will wrestle to determine the one contender for the WOW World Championship.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Lana Star is excited about two things...her team, Miami's Sweat Heat, defending their WOW World Tag Team Championships against The All American Girls, and the large amount of money The Mother Truckers owe her. And Lana's coming to collect on both!

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: David McLane's major announcement - and major reward - sends the locker reeling as the WOW Matchmaker attempts to finally uncover the assailants who attacked The Beast, who finally returns to the ring for the first time since last season.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Top Tier puts their Trios Championships on the line against The Mighty Mights and Keta Rush. Adriana Gambino makes an announcement that affects the entire locker room. In the Main Event, Tormenta and Princess Aussie team up vs Miami's Sweet Heat.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The luxury hotel bill is due and Lana Star has come to collect as Big Rig Betty and Holly Swag report for duty at Lana's mansion. Adriana Gambino debuts her new faction, The Alliance, when BK Rhythm and Gigi Gianni take on The All American Girls.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jessie Jones must defeat Penelope Pink in the Main Event to secure a championship match vs The Beast. Over at Lana Star's Fab Four mansion, Big Rig Betty's tired of working for Lana Star, but is surprised to learn that Holly doesn't seem to mind it.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jessie Jones is ready to talk and shares compelling evidence with David McLane about the attack on The Beast in an effort to claim the $10,000 reward money. In the ring, The Mighty Mights face Miami's Sweet Heat for the WOW Tag Team Championship.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: In the main event, The Classmaster faces Santana Garrett in order to fulfill the stipulation ladi forth by Matchmaker David McLane - a victory will earn her a chance to challenge The Beast for the WOW World Championship.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It's Big Rig Betty and Jessie Jones versus Miami Sweet Heat's Lindsey and Laurie Carlson in the main event to determine who retains the alliance of Holly Swag. New Superhero Xena Phoenix makes her WOW debut against Scout Parker.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Fab Four is fabber than ever, with the addition of Holly Swag. Holly's determined to put her best foot forward with her new crew in her first match in the Foursome against Ashley Blaze. Valentina Diamante debuts for WOW against Coach Campanelli.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It's finally time for Samantha Smart and The Classmaster to collect on the deal they made with Matchmaker David McLane for the main event with a WOW World Championship match against The Beast.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The WOW roster is reeling from last week's news and the videotape delivered from The Beast when Matchmaker David McLane announces a 12-Woman Battle Royale to crown a new champion.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh and Jason track down a fugitive in Texas wanted for murder in Arizona who they find is also sought by his wife who claims he is innocent.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A dying man offers Josh $2000 to find his son, who ran away from home 15 years ago.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh and Jason are escorting four prisoners - three men and one woman - to Leavenworth prison when a stranger begins following along behind asking to travel with the group for protection.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
